Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator

Class Imports

java.lang.Object
dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.Imports
public final class Imports extends Object
Keeps track of imports for a single template, taking generator options into consideration.

  • Field Details

    • LIST_TYPES

      public static final Set<String> LIST_TYPES
      Imports needed for list types.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public SortedSet<String> get()
      Returns a sorted set of classes to import.
      Returns:
      a sorted set of classes to import

    • newApi

      public static Imports newApi(GeneratorOpts opts)
      Creates a new instance for API files. Adds common imports need by all APIs.
      Parameters:
      opts - the generator options
      Returns:
      a new imports instance loaded with enumeration imports

    • newDto

      public static Imports newDto(GeneratorOpts opts)
      Creates a new instance for DTO files. Adds common imports need by all DTOs.
      Parameters:
      opts - the generator options
      Returns:
      a new imports instance loaded with enumeration imports

    • newEnum

      public static Imports newEnum(GeneratorOpts opts)
      Creates a new instance for enumeration types.
      Parameters:
      opts - the generator options
      Returns:
      a new imports instance loaded with enumeration imports

    • newInterface

      public static Imports newInterface(GeneratorOpts opts)
      Adds imports needed for interface templates.
      Parameters:
      opts - the generator options
      Returns:
      a new imports instance

    • newExtras

      public static Imports newExtras(GeneratorOpts opts, ExtraTemplate tmpl)
      Adds imports needed for extra templates.
      Parameters:
      opts - the generator options
      tmpl - the template to add imports for
      Returns:
      a new imports instance

    • addEnumImports

      public Imports addEnumImports(boolean includeTypeAdapter)
      Adds imports needed for rendering an enumeration.
      Parameters:
      includeTypeAdapter - flag to include typeAdaptor
      Returns:
      this

    • addPropertyImports

      public void addPropertyImports(Collection<Property> properties)
      Add imports for the types referenced by properties.
      Parameters:
      properties - the properties to add imports for

    • javax

      public Imports javax(String name)
      Adds imports for javax-class. If jakarta-option is selected, will replace "javax" with "jakarta".
      Parameters:
      name - the class to add import for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • jackson

      public Imports jackson(boolean enable, String... classes)
      Adds optional imports if Jackson is the selected serializer.
      Parameters:
      enable - option to control if the classes should be added
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • jackson

      public Imports jackson(String... classes)
      Adds imports if the Jackson is the selected serializer.
      Parameters:
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • jsonb

      public Imports jsonb(boolean enable, String... classes)
      Adds optional imports if Jsonb is the selected serializer.
      Parameters:
      enable - option to control if the classes should be added
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • jsonb

      public Imports jsonb(String... classes)
      Adds imports if Jsonb is the selected serializer.
      Parameters:
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • add

      public Imports add(Reference ref)
      Adds imports for a reference. If the reference is externally mapped, just adds an import of the class. Otherwise adds imports for dependency and container-wrapper classes as well.
      Parameters:
      ref - the reference to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • addSchema

      public Imports addSchema()
      Adds import for Schema.
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • add

      public Imports add(String... classes)
      Adds imports for the specified (fully qualified) class names.
      Parameters:
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • add

      public Imports add(boolean include, String... classes)
      Adds optional imports for the specified (fully qualified) class names.
      Parameters:
      include - option to control if the classes should be added
      classes - the classes to add imports for
      Returns:
      the imports instance

    • trimContainerImplementations

      public void trimContainerImplementations()
      Remove container implemenetations (e.g. ArrayList) from imports for use in Api files. Maybe need a better way to handle this.
